description: Mapping of dharma practices to their resonant frequencies (in Hz). Frequencies are drawn from the Solfeggio scale, Schumann resonance, and planetary tones. Each practice pairs a primary healing/activation frequency with a grounding or complementary frequency for scalar wave and prayer bowl synthesis.

notes.528: Love / heart activation - primary frequency for Green Tara and Saka Dawa multiplicities
notes.7.83: Schumann fundamental - Earth grounding for manifestations of compassion in the physical realm
notes.136.1: OM frequency of Earth's revolution - grounding for the 88 Buddhas repentance ceremony
notes.pairing_rationale: Each practice pairs a transformational/activation frequency (Solfeggio) with either a grounding frequency (Schumann/OM) or a complementary heart/crown frequency to support the practice's energetic signature.
